metadata.title: Cambridge Starters Gold Mock 2
metadata.description: M4.1 manually authored Pre-A1 Starters gold mock — Animals, Home & Park theme. Full 43-item form with listening, reading & writing, and speaking tasks aligned to the M2.0 blueprint.
metadata.authoringNotes: M4.1 Gold Mock — manually authored and academically reviewed.

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Look at the pictures. Listen and draw a line from each name to the correct person.

This is Max. He's feeding a brown rabbit in the garden.
Mia has got a small kitten. She's holding it carefully.
Leo is wearing a blue shirt. A green parrot is on his shoulder.
Eva is riding a white pony near the farm gate.
Look at Hugo. He's watching ducks on the pond in the park.
audio.caption: Link names to pictures

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and write the missing word or number.

Tom has got a friendly black and white dog. Its name is Patch.
The hamster sleeps in its cage next to the window.
There are three orange fish in the glass bowl.
A little rabbit lives in the garden behind our house.
The bird on the tree is orange and very noisy.
audio.caption: Write words or numbers

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and tick the correct picture.

The cat is sleeping on the sofa in the living room.
The hungry dog is eating a big bone in the kitchen.
The rabbit is eating carrots near the fence.
The ducks are on the pond near the big willow tree.
The horse can jump over the fence very well.
audio.caption: Tick the correct picture

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and colour or draw.

Colour the butterfly purple, please.
Now colour the dog's bowl pink.
Draw a bone next to the puppy on the grass.
Colour the fish in the bowl blue.
Draw a line from the girl to the horse in the field.
audio.caption: Colour and draw

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Hello! My name is Nina. I am seven…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Hello! My name is Nina. I am seven years old. I have got a white rabbit called Floppy. Floppy lives in a hutch in our garden. Every morning I give him fresh carrots and water.

choices.text: Nina has got a rabbit called Floppy.
Floppy is a big brown horse.

content.passage: Hello! My name is Nina. I am seven years old. I have got a white rabbit called Floppy. Floppy lives in a hutch in our garden. Every morning I give him fresh carrots and water.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "This is my bedroom. There is a blue…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: This is my bedroom. There is a blue bed, a desk and a big wardrobe. My hamster cage is on the desk. I keep my books and toys on the shelf above my bed.

choices.text: There is a hamster cage on the desk.
The bed in the bedroom is red.
There are no books in the room.

content.passage: This is my bedroom. There is a blue bed, a desk and a big wardrobe. My hamster cage is on the desk. I keep my books and toys on the shelf above my bed.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Last Saturday we went to Riverside…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Last Saturday we went to Riverside Park. My little brother fed the ducks and I played on the swings. Later we had a picnic under a big oak tree. We walked home when the sun went down.

choices.text: They had a picnic in the park.
They went to the park on Monday.

content.passage: Last Saturday we went to Riverside Park. My little brother fed the ducks and I played on the swings. Later we had a picnic under a big oak tree. We walked home when the sun went down.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Our dog Rex is very clever. He can…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Our dog Rex is very clever. He can sit, fetch his ball and open the kitchen door with his paw. Rex sleeps in a basket next to the sofa. He loves going to the park with my dad.

content.passage: Our dog Rex is very clever. He can sit, fetch his ball and open the kitchen door with his paw. Rex sleeps in a basket next to the sofa. He loves going to the park with my dad.

questions.questionText: Read the text beginning "Yesterday our class visited City Zo…" and choose the best answer.
questions.passage: Yesterday our class visited City Zoo. We saw giraffes, penguins and a sleepy tiger. The zookeeper told us the tiger eats meat twice a day. My favourite animals were the funny penguins.

choices.text: The class visited the zoo yesterday.
They saw dolphins at the zoo.
The tiger eats fruit every day.

content.passage: Yesterday our class visited City Zoo. We saw giraffes, penguins and a sleepy tiger. The zookeeper told us the tiger eats meat twice a day. My favourite animals were the funny penguins.

questions.questionText: Look at the two park scene pictures. Tell your partner about the differences.
questions.prompt: Look at the two pictures of a park. Tell your partner about five differences between them.
followUpQuestions: How many ducks are on the pond in picture A?
What colour is the bench in picture B?
Is there a dog in both pictures?
Where is the kite in picture A?
What is the girl doing in picture B?
